title: phyllanthidea microphylla
intro: Phyllanthidea microphylla, also known as the Phyllanthus microphyllus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including the treatment of fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to improve liver function. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
